shot_types.description: Actor opens product packaging on camera, genuine reaction
shot_types.required_framing: medium shot, hands and face visible

shot_types.description: Actor speaks directly to camera, as if recommending product
shot_types.required_framing: close-up to medium, face fills 60% of frame
shot_types.product_placement: product visible in hand or background

shot_types.description: Actor uses product naturally in daily life setting
shot_types.required_framing: medium to wide, environment tells story

shot_types.description: Actor applies or prepares product in mirror/vanity setting
Split or sequential shots showing product transformation
shot_types.product_placement: same position both shots, only state changes
shot_types.consistency_note: Actor seed and outfit_id must be identical across before/after pair

shot_types.description: Overhead product arrangement, actor hand interaction optional
shot_types.product_placement: product as hero, props as supporting elements

shot_types.description: Actor holds product toward camera as if offering to viewer
shot_types.required_framing: extreme close-up on hands and product, actor torso in bg
shot_types.product_placement: product fully centered, held with both hands
